base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bonus_game_rooms — a tile from 1988 super mario bros 3. Bonus rooms — Toad's Mushroom-House (item-gift), N-Spade (card-match), Coin Ship rare-encounter. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bonus rooms — Toad's Mushroom-House (item-gift), N-Spade (card-match), Coin Ship rare-encounter
